reports.description: Large area of the Radliniec, Lubonieczek and Brzozowiec forest districts was damaged by a severe thunderstorm. Numerous trees (mostly pine trees) were snapped or uprooted. Time was based on a radar data.
Large hail up to at least 2 cm i.d. was reported. The time was based on radar data.
references: Eyewitness report via Łukasz Kuliński - Wielkopolski Łowca Burz (on Facebook), 21 JUN 2026.
